Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-09 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Data Today's data shows two exceptionally strong performers dominating the momentum rankings. BTSG claims the #1 spot with a composite score of 94.2, driven by outstanding consistency across all timeframes—it's up 153% over one year while maintaining all four SMA gates and posting a near-perfect ratio score of 97.04. EACO follows with similarly impressive absolute returns (165% YTD) and strong SMA positioning, though its extreme ratio anomaly (ratio_1w_1d of -173.56 from a flat daily return) and notably weaker bad_spy_score of 3.00 versus BTSG's 1.14 suggest it carries more volatility and downside risk during market stress. Both tickers are substantially outpacing major indices—BTSG leads SPY by 130% over one year and QQQ by 119%—yet both show moderate positive correlation to high-yield bonds (HYG) and tech (QQQ), indicating they're riding broader risk-on sentiment rather than offering true diversification. The data reflects a strong uptrend environment favoring high-momentum equities, but BTSG's superior resilience metrics make it the cleaner signal for short-term momentum strategies.
